title: Provider Schema
description: JSON Schema for LLM inference provider definitions in the OpenModels registry

id.description: Unique identifier for the provider in kebab-case format (lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens)

name.description: Human-readable display name for the provider

description.description: Detailed description of the provider's services and offerings

api_base_url.description: Base URL for the provider's API endpoints (must be HTTPS)

auth_type.description: Authentication method required by the provider's API

regions.description: List of geographic regions or availability zones where the provider operates

items.description: Region identifier (e.g., 'us-east-1', 'eu-west-1') or 'global' for worldwide availability

compatibility.description: API compatibility standard that the provider follows

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the provider entry was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the provider entry was last updated
